title: rorippa × astyla
intro: Rorippa × astyla, also known as land cress, is a natural hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Rorippa nasturtium-aquaticum and Nasturtium officinale. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent. Land cress has been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, as well as its ability to support the digestive system and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, land cress is often used in salads, as a garnish, or as an ingredient in teas and infusions, where its peppery flavor and medicinal properties can be fully utilized.
